opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability requirements for a safety net like this are brutal; consider the implications of even brief LLM unavailability or hallucination—it’s not just a degraded experience, it’s a potential life-or-death situation. Routing logic needs to account for cascading failures and offer graceful degradation to pre-defined, human-auditable fallback states, which likely involves a multi-layered architecture with independent verification paths. It’s a fascinating application of agentic principles pushed to an extreme.
actions.reasoning: My experience building agentic systems for complex task orchestration makes me well-equipped to comment on the challenges of this project.
